bead.title: FEAT-001: add 'ddx tries' namespace for layer-2 worktree records
bead.description:
PROBLEM
FEAT-001 documents 'ddx tries <subcommand>' as an imperative (non-deprecated) surface for layer-2 worktree records, but no such command exists. Worktree start/end and merge-or-preserve outcomes from 'ddx try' are not introspectable through the documented unified surface.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-001-cli.md:61-62 defines §21b 'ddx tries <subcommand>' as layer-2 worktree start/end plus merge/preserve records. No cli/cmd/tries*.go exists (verified: no matches, 2026-06-19 audit). The worktree start/end and merge-or-preserve outcome records are already emitted by 'ddx try' into the executions/attachments evidence stores.

PROPOSED FIX
Add a 'ddx tries' cobra command namespace in cli/cmd/tries.go that lists layer-2 worktree records — worktree start/end events and merge-or-preserve outcomes — read from the existing executions/attachments evidence stores written by 'ddx try'. Do not add new persistence.

NON-SCOPE
Do not remove or alter the existing 'ddx try'/'ddx exec'/'ddx log' surfaces — deprecation is tracked separately. Do not add new persistence; read only from existing executions/attachments stores. Do not implement 'ddx runs' log/history/metrics (sibling beads).
bead.acceptance:
1. 'ddx tries --help' exits 0 and lists layer-2 worktree records (start/end, merge/preserve outcomes) per FEAT-001 §21b.
2. 'ddx tries' surfaces worktree start/end and merge-or-preserve outcome records read from the existing executions/attachments stores written by 'ddx try' (no new persistence).
3. TestTriesCommandHelp and TestTriesCommandRecords exercise the surface against a fixture repo via testutils.NewFixtureRepo(t, ...).
4. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
